name: radial_shapes
description: Reference-parity: the radial-falloff SHAPE curves (linear / easeIn / easeOut / smooth / custom). Each case scales a seg-4 cube along Y under a radial falloff of that shape; the dense vertex set samples the curve across t in [0.5,0.87] and asserts every vertex against the frozen reference. Confirms vibe3d applyShape == the reference's radial falloff per profile (custom verifies the in_/out_ tangent convention). Empty reset.
source: Frozen reference capture (radial falloff, real-GL session; captured from a reference session via the private capture tooling).

input.argstring: prim.cube cenX:0 cenY:0 cenZ:0 sizeX:1 sizeY:1 sizeZ:1 segmentsX:4 segmentsY:4 segmentsZ:4 radius:0
